== Notes for [[Item:Q105859|Q105859]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lubaba_bint_Ubaydillah
--------------------
Lubaba, who married Ali ibn Abdullah ibn Jaafar and had descendants.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018912521879

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
